recommended_paths: Resolve the duplicated policy/catalog ownership before closing the quality gate, then rerun the no-context audit.
exact_next_step: Record reviewer resolutions in the governing TODO using the machine-checkable resolution table or equivalent gate ledger, then extract the derived resolution packet and decide whether another bounded review pass is still required.

findings.title: Rich-text sanitization policy is duplicated between public renderer and tenant-admin editor
findings.rationale: The editor had its own blank/sanitize/allowed-tags policy instead of delegating to the shared SafeRichHtml policy, so admin input cleanup could diverge from public rendering semantics.
findings.suggested_action: Expose a shared sanitize helper from SafeRichHtml and make the editor use it for imported HTML and serialized output.

findings.title: Discovery-filter rule catalog duplicates legacy map-filter catalog construction
findings.rationale: Canonical discovery filter editing reuses map-specific rule/catalog types and the legacy settings controller had a second catalog builder path, which creates drift risk between Map and Discovery filter admin flows.
findings.suggested_action: Route the legacy map editor and canonical discovery editor through one source-neutral catalog builder or adapter and keep map-specific compatibility at the boundary only.
